part.text:
Done — I created a polished, fully playable single-file Snake game at `index.html`.

It includes:
- Arrow key controls
- Live score display + persistent best score (via `localStorage`)
- Proper game-over detection (wall/self collision)
- Restart support (`Enter`, `Space`, `R`, or click button)
- Inline HTML/CSS/JS only, with a responsive polished UI

Open `index.html` in your browser to play.
